hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then TARGET=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); else TARGET=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' | head -1); fi; BASE=$(basename "$TARGET" 2>/dev/null); case "$BASE" in .env.example|.env.sample|.env.template) exit 0;; .env|.env.*) echo 'Blocked: editing .env files is forbidden in this repo (see AGENTS.md boundaries).' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

INPUT=$(cat); if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then TARGET=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); else TARGET="$INPUT"; fi; if printf '%s' "$TARGET" | grep -qE 'git +push[^|;&"]*( --force[^ "]*| --mirror( |$|")| -[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*( |$|")| \+[^ "]+)'; then echo 'Blocked: force pushes are forbidden in this repo (see AGENTS.md boundaries).' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
